title: Refined Block Placing
description: Changes how block are placed by placing a new block every time the cursor moves over to a new block
body:
This mod is inspired by [Better Placement](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-placement) by tterrag1098 and PreciseBlockPlacing by Ellemes

In vanilla, holding down the right mouse button causes a new block to be placed every four ticks (every 0.2 seconds).

This mod causes a new block to be placed every time the cursor is pointing at a new location, making it possible to place a line of blocks very quickly.
